title: rubus horridus var. apiculatus
intro: Rubus horridus var. apiculatus, also known as the bramble or thorny raspberry, is a prickly shrub native to the mountainous regions of Europe, used in traditional herbal medicine. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions such as digestive issues, skin problems, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Rubus horridus var. apiculatus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a popular remedy in natural and traditional medicine.
